name: plan-to-vault
description: Automatically archive Claude Code plan files to an Obsidian vault when exiting plan mode. Labels each plan with its origin machine for multi-device visibility.

vault_path.title: Obsidian Vault Path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault (e.g., /home/user/Vaults/MyVault or C:\Users\user\Vaults\MyVault)
